---
title: "mighty"
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{mighty}
  %\VignetteEngine{quarto::html}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    collapse: true
    comment: '#>'
---

# Getting started

`mighty`is an "orchestrater" to build ADaM programs from a specification, by 
using standard components (such as those in 
[`mighty.component`](https://github.com/NN-OpenSource/mighty.component)) and custom components 
(that either cannot be standardised or hasn't been so yet).


# TODO: How to use the package(?)

currently we basically create an initialisation file which will not
be the case in the final product(?)
